name: Mushroom and Bacon Sauce for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until the onion is golden.
3. Stir in bacon; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes or until the bacon is crisp.
4. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until they are tender.
5. Blend in flour and cook for 1 minute.
6. Remove the pan from heat. Gradually stir in milk and cream. Return to heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce boils and thickens.
7. Stir in parsley and black pepper. Serve over pasta.
